name: edutech-platform-frontend
description: Frontend application for the EduTech Platform.

scripts.clean: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; const paths=['dist','build','out','coverage','.vite','.cache','.turbo','node_modules/.cache','tsconfig.tsbuildinfo']; for (const path of paths) fs.rmSync(path,{recursive:true,force:true}); for (const file of fs.readdirSync('.')) if (/^(npm|yarn|pnpm)-debug\.log/.test(file)||/\.log$/.test(file)||/\.tsbuildinfo$/.test(file)||file==='Thumbs.db'||file==='.DS_Store') fs.rmSync(file,{force:true});"
